landmarks.name: The Thing (countdown, sign one)
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: What is it? The Thing? Mystery of the desert ahead. Two hundred miles to guess, and whatever you do, do not stop moving.

landmarks.name: The Thing (countdown, sign two)
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: The Thing. Still ahead, still a mystery, still a dollar or two to find out. No officials of any type allowed -- if you're one, turn back now or hide your identity.

landmarks.name: The Thing (countdown, sign three)
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: The Thing, next exit. You have wondered for two hundred miles. Do not drive past now. You made it. Will you survive?
